title: Revitalised MC
description: This is a lightweight modpack inspired by BetterMC, and I tried to include only mods that do not make you feel confused.
body:
**_Minecraft Revitalised_** is a modpack that enhances the classic Minecraft experience while staying true to the game's original feel. It introduces improved world generation, new biomes, better visuals, more structures to explore, and expanded gameplay mechanics—all without breaking the vanilla atmosphere.

-   **Better World** – new biomes, enhanced caves, and more dynamic terrain
  
-   **More Content** – additional blocks, items, and structures to discover
  
-   **Improved Gameplay** – enhanced combat, smarter mob AI, and new challenges
  
-   **Optimizations & QoL Features** – better performance, refined UI, and useful tweaks

MODPACK IS IN **BETA** SO BUGS CAN OCCUR!
